title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
